Details

## Détails

Code porte 1 : 1204 - bien appuyer sur les touches
Code porte 2 : #6748 ne pas oublier le # au début!

This dbt Meetup is an opportunity for the local Paris dbt Community to connect and collaborate. If you work with data, this event is for you. We welcome data analysts, scientists, engineers, architects, and more!
➡️ Join the dbt Slack community: https://community.getdbt.com/
Join the conversation in the #local-paris channel in dbt Slack to connect with other data practitioners locally.
-------------
🇫🇷 Nous serons heureux de vous retrouver pour un nouveau meetup avec toujours le meme format de 2 présentations sur des sujets liés a l'utilisation de dbt.
Quel que soit votre job dans la data, n'hésitez pas a venir!
Anouar de dbt labs nous fera le plaisir de revenir sur l'événement dbt coalesce :

présentation des dernières nouveautés de dbt
sommaire des vidéos à revoir
et autres infos sur l'événement!

🤝Organisateur: Infinite Lambda (dbt Services Partner of the Year Europe)
🏠Lieu : Deskeo République, 32 rue rené Boulanger 75010
🗓️ Date: mercredi 14 mai

18.15: Ouverture des portes, drinks
18:45: Break the Silos: Flat & Cross-Skills Teams for Data Impact @
Kim Nguyen, Lead Analytics Engineer at Lalilo
19.15: Déployer dbt docs sur GitLab Pages : une documentation vivante pour toute l’équipe @ Bilel Mosbah ex-Galleries Lafayette
19.45: dbt Cloud : Revue de features techniques
20.00: Networking, Boissons et snacks

Tous les talks seront en Français

Quel que soit votre job dans la data, n'hésitez pas a venir!

To attend, please read the Health and Safety Policy and Terms of Participation: https://www.getdbt.com/legal/health-and-safety-policy

dbt is the standard in data transformation, used by over 50,000 organizations worldwide. Through the application of software engineering best practices like modularity, version control, testing, and documentation, dbt’s analytics engineering workflow helps teams work more efficiently to produce data the entire organization can trust. Learn more: https://www.getdbt.com/

events.raw_text:

Tue, Jun 3, 2025 · 6:30 PM to 9:30 PM CEST

Coolandworkers

2 rue de Dahomey · Paris

dbt Global Circuit Series: Paris with Jerco

Hosted by Jeremy C. and Charlotte M.

Paris dbt Meetup
4.6
69 reviews
Details

🇫🇷 Nous serons heureux de vous retrouver pour un nouveau dbt meetup !

Ce meetup ne sera pas comme les autres : cette fois-ci Jeremy Cohen, Principal Product Manager chez dbt Labs, sera avec nous en tant qu’intervenant ! Il vous fera découvrir les dernières nouveautés dbt et vous pourrez jouer avec les nouvelles fonctionnalités.

Ce rendez-vous est parfait pour les curieux, les bâtisseurs, les explorateurs — toutes celles et ceux qui aiment se retrousser les manches (métaphoriquement parlant), apprendre ensemble, et imaginer le futur de l’ingénierie analytique.

Que vous soyez là pour découvrir les nouveautés, voir comment d’autres résolvent des défis similaires, ou poser les questions qui font réfléchir — vous êtes au bon endroit !

Jeremy Cohen (Jerco) de dbt labs nous fera le plaisir de faire la presentation!
🤝Organisateur: dbt Labs (Charlotte Maupu, Solutions Architect)
🏠Lieu : 2 Rue Dahomey, Paris, 75011
🗓️ Date: mardi 3 juin
🎙️Langue: Français

18.30: Ouverture des portes
19.00: Présentation par Jeremy Cohen (jerco) @ dbt Labs + Q&A/questions et réponses
19.40-21:30: Networking, Swag, Boissons et snacks

------
To attend, please read the Health and Safety Policy and Terms of Participation: https://www.getdbt.com/legal/health-and-safety-policy

➡️ Join the dbt Slack community: https://community.getdbt.com/
🇫🇷 Join the conversation in the #local-paris channel in dbt Slack to connect with other data practitioners locally.

dbt is the standard in data transformation, used by over 50,000 organizations worldwide. Through the application of software engineering best practices like modularity, version control, testing, and documentation, dbt’s analytics engineering workflow helps teams work more efficiently to produce data the entire organization can trust. Learn more: https://www.getdbt.com/

Read more
Speaker
Jeremy Cohen

Jeremy has been working to empower data teams with dbt for over 7 years. He got his start building modern data stacks for up-and-coming organizations as an Analytics Engineering consultant. Since then, he has been charting the course for dbt, and continuing to support its fast-growing community.

Jérémy, Product Manager chez dbt Labs, partagera les principes et l'approche de dbt labs en matière de product analytics, via des exemples concrets qui parleront autant aux fans de dbt Core qu’à ceux de dbt Cloud.

To attend, please read the Health and Safety Policy and Terms of Participation: https://www.getdbt.com/legal/health-and-safety-policy

events.raw_text:
Skip to content

Thu, Nov 21, 2024 · 8:00 PM to 9:00 PM CET

Online event

This event has passed

Community AMA with Erica Louie (dbt Labs)
Network event

99 attendees from 54 groups hosting

D

Hosted by dbt L.

Super Organizer

Paris dbt Meetup
4.6
69 reviews
Details

REGISTER HERE 👉 https://www.getdbt.com/resources/webinars/community-slack-ama

🚀 Hey Community! Are you ready to dive deep, get insights, and satisfy your curiosity?

We’re hosting monthly live Ask Me Anything events! It's the perfect platform to quench your curiosity and get to know each other better. Don't miss out on this opportunity to connect and learn together.

What to Expect:

Discussing trends in the analytics space
Sharing key takeaways from the recent events
Hearing your questions and thoughts

Speaker: Erica Louie, Data @ dbt Labs
Host: Bolaji Oyejide, Digital Community Mgr @ dbt Labs
Topic: Careers in data, building a data team, the dbt Semantic Layer, and scaling your dbt project
When: November 21st @ 2pm EST
Where: Virtual and in #dbt-community-merge

Erica was the second employee at dbt Labs, then called Fishtown Analytics and she's seen dbt grow, a lot. In this AMA, Erica will share more on her career in data, her strong opinions on building a data team, how she manages her team, the dbt Semantic Layer, scaling your dbt project, and more on her Substack.

Register now to get the link to watch and join the #dbt-community-ama channel in Slack to participate live!

Read more
Speaker
Erica Louie, dbt Labs

Second hire at dbt Labs, former Head of Data, and now leading the product data team (and previously worked for BuzzFeed's data team), Erica "ric" Louie proudly hails from a liberal arts background (studied political science + italian) and grew her career in data at dbt Labs starting from the ground-up. She firmly believes that anyone can be a data practitioner with the right mentors, resources (sans trivial data jargon), and a good sense of humor. While rethinking the philosophy behind data systems, operations, and teams is one of her favorite topics, she enjoys thinking and writing about the human experience, and how it intersects with the work we choose to do and who we choose to do it with.

## Details

This dbt Meetup is an opportunity for the local Paris dbt Community to connect and collaborate. If you work with data, this event is for you. We welcome data analysts, scientists, engineers, architects, and more!
➡️ Join the dbt Slack community: https://community.getdbt.com/
Join the conversation in the #local-paris channel in dbt Slack to connect with other data practitioners locally.
-------------
🇫🇷 Nous serons heureux de vous retrouver pour un nouveau meetup avec toujours le meme format de 2 présentations sur des sujets liés a l'utilisation de dbt.
Quel que soit votre job dans la data, n'hésitez pas a venir!

Anouar de dbt labs nous fera le plaisir de revenir sur l'événement dbt coalesce :

présentation des dernières nouveautés de dbt
sommaire des vidéos à revoir
et autres infos sur l'événement!

🤝Organisateur: Infinite Lambda (dbt Services Partner of the Year Europe)
🏠Lieu : Deskeo République, 32 rue rené Boulanger 75010
🗓️ Date: mercredi 23 octobre

18.30: Ouverture des portes, drinks
19:00: Retour sur dbt coalesce, Anouar Hnini @dbt
19.30: Macif : Migration massive d'Informatica vers dbt
20.00: Networking, Boissons et snacks

To attend, please read the Health and Safety Policy and Terms of Participation: https://www.getdbt.com/legal/health-and-safety-policy

dbt is the standard in data transformation, used by over 40,000 organizations worldwide. Through the application of software engineering best practices like modularity, version control, testing, and documentation, dbt’s analytics engineering workflow helps teams work more efficiently to produce data the entire organization can trust. Learn more: https://www.getdbt.com/

Voici les instructions pour aller dans la salle: composez le code de l'immeuble 0571 (digicode de gauche) pour entrer.
Saisissez ensuite le code de la deuxième porte #3107, traversez le hall, empruntez le couloir et tournez à gauche après les miroirs pour accéder à la cour extérieure. Descendez ensuite les escaliers intérieurs qui mènent à l'espace, où vous trouverez votre salle de réunion. Entrez le code 1921 sur la poignée pour y accéder.

Wed, Sep 14, 2022 · 7:00 PM to 10:00 PM CEST

The Red Balloon

51 Rue Notre Dame de Nazareth · Paris

Paris dbt Meetup - Apéro

Hosted by Pauline I. and 2 others

Paris dbt Meetup
4.6
69 reviews
Details

dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data! Talks predominantly focus on community members' experience with dbt, however you'll catch presentations on broader topics such as analytics engineering, data stacks, data ops, modelling, testing, and team structures.

We are excited to bring Paris-based folks in the dbt community together! Looking forward to socializing and seeing both new and familiar faces. This meetup will not feature content, but is rather an opportunity for folks to connect and build connections with other analytics engineers and data folks.
-------------
🇫🇷 Nous avons hate de rassembler la communauté dbt parisienne! Pour ce premier évenement nous vous proposons de se rencontrer et echanger autours de verres entre professionnels de la data.
Lors de meetups futurs nous vous proposerons des interventions sur des sujets spécifiques en rapport avec dbt et plus generalement sur des problematiques autour de la data.
Que vous soyez data engineer, analyst, architect, scientist ou autre, n'hesitez pas a venir!

🏠Lieu : Le Ballon Rouge, 51 Rue Notre Dame de Nazareth, 75003
🤝Organisateur: Infinite Lambda
🍇 Boissons et snacks
🗓️ Date: mercredi, le 14 septembre de 7pm-10pm (Meetup.com dit 15 septembre mais c'est le 14. Nous sommes en train de verifier pour quoi la date est changé chaque fois qu'on la corrige)

To attend, please read the Required Participation Language for In-Person Events with dbt Labs: https://bit.ly/3QIJXFb

----------------------------------
➡️ Join the dbt Slack community: https://www.getdbt.com/community/
🤝🇫🇷 For the best Meetup experience, make sure to join the #local-paris channel in dbt Slack (https://slack.getdbt.com/).

dbt is an open source command-line tool that speaks the preferred language of data analysts everywhere—SQL. With dbt, analysts take ownership of the entire analytics engineering workflow, from writing data transformation code to deployment and documentation.

Learn more: https://www.getdbt.com/
